ContactUsPage.title: Contact Mythoria
ContactUsPage.intro: Have a question, an idea, or need help with a story or printed book? Tell us what is happening and we will get back to you as soon as we can. We love thoughtful feedback, especially when it helps make Mythoria easier to use.
ContactUsPage.scrollIntro: Choose the topic closest to your message:

form.title: Contact Form
form.name: Your Name:
form.messagePlaceholder: Share your question, idea, or feedback...

join.title: Work with Mythoria
join.intro: We are building Mythoria with people and partners who care about personal stories, careful service, and thoughtful technology.
join.printing: Printing & logistics partners: help us deliver personalized books with consistent quality, care, and reliable timings.
join.country: Country managers & local partners: help us bring Mythoria to new markets, languages, and communities.
join.developers: Developers and AI specialists: collaborate with us on tools that make story creation simpler, faster, and more personal.
join.call: Interested in working with us? Send your details through the form above and tell us your area of interest.

bonus.title: Help Improve Mythoria
bonus.content: If you report a valid bug or suggest a feature that helps other storytellers, we may thank you with bonus credits.
bonus.disclaimer: (*) Bonus credits are reviewed by the Mythoria team and awarded at our discretion.
bonus.closing: Thank you for helping us write Mythoria's next chapter.
